LanguageData.CE_TurretHeavyWeapons.label: heavy weapons
LanguageData.CE_TurretHeavyWeapons.description: Allows you to assemble high-caliber weapons, automatic grenade launchers and artillery.

CE_TurretHeavyWeapons.generalRules.rules.li: subject_story->hardened components to withstand enormously high pressures
subject_story->survived a years-long siege on a war-world
subject_story->worked in a factory that manufactured artillery barrels

LanguageData.CE_HeavyTurret.label: heavy auto turrets

CE_HeavyTurret.generalRules.rulesStrings.li: subject_story->optimized automated fire-control systems for long range engagements
subject_story->worked for an urbworld firm that produced mechanoid sensory systems

LanguageData.CE_ChargeTurret.label: charge blaster turrets
LanguageData.CE_ChargeTurret.description: Learn to construct charge blaster turrets.

CE_ChargeTurret.generalRules.rulesString.li: subject_story->created denser power units for higher draw
subject_story->explored the remnants of a toxic world battlefield
subject_story->took part in a doomed assault against a mechanoid stronghold
